title: ModelConnection
description: A per-project binding of a provider family to a secret REFERENCE (spec §27.2, E13 T8). Admin-only (the `provision` capability); never model-creatable. The credential itself is never persisted or returned — only the secret_ref handle into the E13 T3 secret store travels here.

provider.description: The adapter family the broker dials at call time (e.g. provider-one).

secret_ref.description: A handle into the E13 T3 secret store; the credential value is redeemed at call time and never appears in any response.
